missions.name: Lower-Band Anchor Maintenance
missions.briefing: Cloud City Operations Bureau, contractor desk. Standing call: maintenance pass on lower-band atmospheric anchors, low-priority. Standard cycle. Collect the listed supply manifest from the designated body, deliver to anchor grid on approach. File the receipt at any kiosk. — Operations.

missions.name: Upper-Band Atmospheric Survey
missions.briefing: Operations, contractor desk. Survey pass requested on upper-band atmospheric strata. Deploy probes at prescribed hold altitudes, recover telemetry packet before return. Standard rate. No special handling required. — Operations.

missions.name: Anchor Grid Resupply Run
missions.briefing: Operations. Atmospheric anchor maintenance. Standard cycle. Resupply run to co-orbital body, materials listed in manifest. Return with confirmation receipt. Rated low-complexity. — Operations.
